locations.name: Charhollow slaughterhouses
locations.description: Turf of The Billhooks. A tough gang of butchers and tanners, known for their brutal violence and their control of the meat trade.

locations.name: Crow's Foot district
locations.description: Turf of The Crows. An old gang with a reputation for honor and fair dealing. They run gambling and protection rackets.

locations.name: Widespread across several districts
locations.description: Turf of The Hive. The largest criminal organization in Doskvol. They deal in drugs, contraband, and every vice imaginable.

locations.name: Crow's Foot (contested)
locations.description: Turf of The Lampblacks. Former factory workers turned gang. They run protection and smuggling in Crow's Foot.

locations.name: Silkshore streets
locations.description: Turf of The Wraiths. A small gang of thieves and pickpockets operating in Silkshore.

locations.name: Six Towers
locations.description: Turf of The Gray Cloaks. Thieves and spies who traffic in secrets and blackmail material.

locations.name: The Docks
locations.description: Turf of Ulf Ironborn. A Skovlander refugee turned gang leader, fighting for his people.

locations.name: All districts
locations.description: Turf of The Bluecoats. The city watch of Doskvol. Corrupt and brutal, they serve the interests of the wealthy.

locations.name: Whitecrown HQ
locations.description: Turf of The Inspectors. The investigative branch of the government, more competent and less corrupt than the Bluecoats.

locations.name: Bellweather Crematorium
locations.description: Turf of The Spirit Wardens. The official keepers of the dead in Doskvol. They hunt rogue spirits and destroy undead.

locations.name: Government buildings, Whitecrown
locations.description: Turf of The Ministry of Preservation. The Imperial bureaucracy that oversees the lightning barriers and essential city infrastructure.

locations.name: The Docks, open sea
locations.description: Turf of The Leviathan Hunters. Brave crews that venture into the Void Sea to hunt the massive demons that swim there. Their blood fuels the lightning barriers.

locations.name: Ironhook Island
locations.description: Turf of Ironhook Prison. The notorious prison of Doskvol, where criminals are sent to hard labor or worse.

locations.name: Charterhall, City Hall
locations.description: Turf of The City Council. The governing body of Doskvol. Composed of noble families and appointed officials.

locations.name: Temples in every district
locations.description: Turf of The Church of Ecstasy. The official state religion, devoted to forgotten gods and the comfort of the living in a bleak world.

locations.name: Hidden sanctums
locations.description: Turf of The Path of Echoes. A secret society of occultists who commune with spirits and seek hidden truths.

locations.name: Six Towers estate
locations.description: Turf of The Dimmer Sisters. Three reclusive sisters who deal in spirits, ghosts, and dark artifacts from their estate in Six Towers.

locations.name: Hidden shrines
locations.description: Turf of The Forgotten Gods. A loose cult devoted to the ancient gods that existed before the Cataclysm shattered the world.

locations.name: The ghost field
locations.description: Turf of The Reconciled. A secret society of ghosts who have retained their sanity and work to protect the living from supernatural threats.

locations.name: Canals and waterways
locations.description: Turf of The Gondoliers. The canal boat operators of Doskvol. They know every waterway and tunnel in the city.

locations.name: Print shops in Charterhall
locations.description: Turf of The Ink Rakes. Journalists and pamphleteers who trade in scandal, gossip, and truth when convenient.

locations.name: Major thoroughfares
locations.description: Turf of The Cabbies. Carriage drivers who form an informal intelligence network across the city.

locations.name: Noble estates
locations.description: Turf of The Servants. A secret network of household servants who share intelligence about their noble employers.

locations.name: Scurlock Manor, Six Towers
locations.description: Turf of Lord Scurlock. An ancient vampire who poses as a reclusive noble. Controls vast wealth and dark secrets.

locations.name: Unknown
locations.description: Turf of The Unseen. The most elite thieves' guild in Doskvol. Their existence is debated.

locations.name: Private clubs in Whitecrown
locations.description: Turf of The Foundation. A secret society of elite aristocrats who manipulate city politics from the shadows.

locations.name: Coalridge, Charhollow
locations.description: Turf of The Brigade. Firefighters who also run protection rackets. Pay them or watch it burn.

locations.name: Dunslough waterways
locations.description: Turf of The Fog Hounds. A scrappy crew of smugglers who know the fog-shrouded canals better than anyone.

locations.name: Barracks in Charhollow
locations.description: Turf of The Silver Nails. A mercenary company specializing in supernatural threats. They hunt ghosts for coin.

locations.name: Private estates in Whitecrown
locations.description: Turf of The Circle of Flame. A secret society of wealthy elites who conduct forbidden arcane rituals.
